page_metadata.biotools__summary: PLUMED is a plugin that works with a large number of molecular dynamics codes (Codes interfaced with PLUMED ). It can be used to analyse features of the dynamics on-the-fly or to perform a wide variety of free energy methods. PLUMED can also work as a Command Line Tools to perform analysis on trajectories saved in most of the existing formats.
